stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true with regard to mountain waves?

options.a: The absence of cloud over high ground indicates the absence of mountain waves
options.b: Flight with tailwind toward high ground is likely to be more hazardous than flight with headwind toward high ground
options.c: Flight with headwind toward high ground is likely to be more hazardous than flight with tailwind toward high ground
options.d: Mountain waves are not experienced beyond 100 miles downwind from initiating high ground, regardless of the height of the ground
